title: PgvectorAssetComponent
description: Generate OpenAI text embeddings and upsert them into a PostgreSQL pgvector table as a Dagster asset.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

database_url_env_var.description: Env var containing the PostgreSQL connection URL.

source_table.description: Source table to read text from. Accepts schema.table or bare table.

id_column.description: Primary key column in the source table.

text_column.description: Column containing the raw text to embed.

target_table.description: Table to write embeddings into. Created automatically if it does not exist.

if_exists.description: upsert — INSERT … ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE; replace — DROP and recreate.

openai_api_key_env_var.description: Env var containing the OpenAI API key.

dimensions.description: Vector dimensionality. Must match the chosen embedding model.

batch_size.description: Number of texts sent to the OpenAI API per request.
